database.command: node -e "console.log('Initializing DB...'); setTimeout(() => { console.log('Database Ready on port 5432'); setInterval(() => console.log('DB heartbeat...'), 5000); }, 2000);"

backend-api.command: node -e "console.log('Starting API...'); console.log('Connecting to database...'); setTimeout(() => { console.log('API Server running on port 8080'); setInterval(() => console.log('Handling requests...'), 3000); }, 1500);"

frontend.command: node -e "console.log('Starting Frontend...'); console.log('Waiting for API...'); setTimeout(() => { console.log('Frontend available at http://localhost:3000'); setInterval(() => {}, 10000); }, 1000);"
